## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.13

### Cameras
- Keeps the native Home Assistant WebRTC stream path unchanged from the prerelease where camera switching was reported working.
- Leaves the stream signaling, ICE candidate queueing, and camera live source handling untouched in this prerelease.

### Devices
- Keeps SBS50 child device support for SWS51 water sensors.
- Makes the optional SWS51 child info shadow read failure-contained so it cannot interrupt the normal SBS50 refresh path.
- Caches the supplemental SWS51 child info read after it succeeds or is confirmed missing to avoid repeated extra shadow reads.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage that SWS51 child info is still merged when available.
- Adds regression coverage that a failed optional SWS51 child info read does not fail the normal SBS50 state refresh.
